control.description-key: LeanToolKit meeting selector — generates the meeting instances for a cadence (annually … shiftly, with crew roster patterns like 2D-2N-5O), matches them to existing meeting records, flags past instances with no record, and emits the tapped row on Selected Meeting (JSON) so OnChange can open or create the record.

property.name: finalDate
property.description-key: The latest date to show meeting instances for (yyyy-mm-dd). Empty = today. e.g. Text(Today(),"yyyy-mm-dd").

property.name: daysPrior
property.description-key: How many days before Final Date to include (the window size). Default 14.

property.name: category
property.description-key: The meeting cadence. Shiftly generates a day-shift instance at Time Of Day and a night-shift instance 12 hours later.

property.name: daysOfWeek
property.description-key: Which weekdays the meeting occurs (weekly/daily/shiftly): CSV of names or numbers, e.g. Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri or 1,2,3,4,5. Empty = every day.

property.name: timeOfDay
property.description-key: Meeting time, 24h HH:MM (e.g. 07:00). For shiftly this is the day-shift meeting; the night-shift meeting is 12 hours later.

property.name: crewList
property.description-key: Crew names in roster order, CSV or JSON array, e.g. A,B,C,D.

property.name: rosterPattern
property.description-key: The repeating crew pattern: blocks of Days / Nights / Off, e.g. 2D-2N-5O-2D-3N-4O. Applies to shiftly/daily. Empty = no roster.

property.name: baseStartDate
property.description-key: The recurrence anchor (yyyy-mm-dd). For annually/quarterly/monthly the relative weekday (e.g. 1st Monday) is taken from this date. For roster patterns it is the date the FIRST listed crew started its first day shift; each next crew starts days when the previous crew moves onto nights.

property.name: existingMeetingsJSON
property.description-key: The already-created meeting records: [{date (or datetime), rescheduledDate?, recordId, values?:{colKey: text}}]. Instances are matched by date (and shift for shiftly); past instances with no match are flagged as having no record, and vanish once more than 7 days old (assumed not to have happened). values pre-fill the custom columns.

property.name: columns
property.description-key: Optional custom text columns entered per meeting row (e.g. topic, chair, notetaker): CSV of labels (Topic,Chair,Notetaker) or a JSON array of strings / {key,label}. Values pre-fill from Existing Meetings and are emitted on Selected Meeting.

property.name: peopleJSON
property.description-key: The full roster this meeting draws attendees from: [{whoId, who, crew?}]. crew links a person to an entry in Crew List; people without a crew always attend. Feeds the Attendees output when an instance is selected.

property.name: selectedMeetingJSON
property.description-key: The tapped (or edited) instance: {iso, date, day, time, crew, shift, recordId, rescheduledTo, status, values:{colKey: text}, selectedAt}. recordId is empty when no record exists yet — open or create accordingly in OnChange. selectedAt changes on every tap/edit so OnChange always fires.

property.name: attendeesJSON
property.description-key: The expected attendees of the SELECTED instance: people whose crew matches the on-shift crew, plus everyone without a crew. No roster or no crew on the instance = the whole people list. Bind straight into the board cards People (JSON) inputs. Empty until an instance is selected.

property.name: settingsJSON
property.description-key: Consolidated configuration: {title, prompts, readOnly, theme:{background,foreground,accent,legend,font}, config:{finalDate, daysPrior, category, daysOfWeek, timeOfDay, crewList, rosterPattern, baseStartDate, existingMeetingsJSON, columns}}. Settings are the base; a non-empty discrete text input overrides its key (enum inputs: the settings key wins when present).

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar (typically the meeting name). Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional coaching prompts: plain text, or JSON array of strings / {field, hint} objects. Shown as empty-state text and an info popover.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for the selected row and highlights. Default rich black.

property.name: legendColors
property.description-key: JSON array or CSV: [unused, crew 1, crew 2, crew 3, crew 4] badge colours. Defaults blue / green / amber / purple.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for all text.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, the custom-column fields are disabled (rows stay selectable — selecting a row is what the card is for).
